name: @elizaos/capacitor-gateway
description: Connects the app to an Eliza Gateway with discovery, RPC, and realtime events.
author: elizaOS

scripts.verify: bun run verify:ios && bun run verify:android && bun run verify:web
scripts.verify:ios: cd ios && pod install && xcodebuild -workspace Plugin.xcworkspace -scheme Plugin -destination generic/platform=iOS && cd ..
scripts.verify:android: cd android && ./gradlew clean build test && cd ..
scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe . && bash -c 'if command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run swiftlint -- lint --fix; fi'
scripts.lint:check: bunx @biomejs/biome check . && bash -c 'if command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run swiftlint -- lint; fi'
scripts.fmt: bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe . && bash -c 'if command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run swiftlint -- lint --fix; fi'
scripts.build:docs: bun run clean && bun run docgen && tsc && bunx rollup -c rollup.config.mjs
scripts.build:unlocked: bun run clean && tsc && bunx rollup -c rollup.config.mjs

platformDetails.browser: Full WebSocket connectivity, RPC request/response, event streaming. No Bonjour/mDNS discovery on web.
platformDetails.node: Full support via Electrobun with native Bonjour/mDNS discovery and WebSocket connectivity
